<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo noupdate="1">

    <!-- Sanal POS Ödeme Yöntemi -->
    <record id="payment_method_sanal_pos_card" model="payment.method">
        <field name="name">Kredi/Banka Kartı</field>
        <field name="code">card</field>
        <field name="primary_payment_method_id" ref="payment.payment_method_card"/>
        <field name="active">True</field>
    </record>

</odoo>
